    class C {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~

          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.

!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      in x = 1;
      ~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
         ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.

!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
      out y = 2;
      ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'out'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
    }
    
    local isIn = "x" in { x = 1 };
    for k = 1, 1 do
      console.log(k);
      ~~~~~~~
